tests.description: Vitest config loads and executes
tests.validates: Project scaffolding and Vitest configuration

tests.description: parsePrUrl extracts owner/repo/pullNumber from valid URLs
tests.validates: Correct parsing of standard and variant PR URLs

tests.description: parsePrUrl rejects non-GitHub and non-PR URLs
tests.validates: Throws descriptive errors for invalid inputs

tests.description: parsePrUrl edge cases (zero, negative, non-numeric)
tests.validates: Rejects pull/0, pull/-1, pull/abc

tests.description: fetchPrMetadata returns typed metadata on success
tests.validates: Maps GitHub API response to PrMetadata (mocked fetch)

tests.description: fetchPrMetadata sends auth header when token provided
tests.validates: Authorization header present/absent based on token

tests.description: fetchPrMetadata handles 404 and 403 errors
tests.validates: Throws GitHubApiError with correct status and message

tests.description: fetchPrDiff returns raw diff string
tests.validates: Sends diff Accept header, returns text (mocked fetch)

tests.description: fetchPrDiff handles empty diff
tests.validates: Returns empty string for no-change PRs

tests.description: truncateDiff cuts at hunk boundaries with marker
tests.validates: Truncation at last complete file section, [truncated] appended

tests.description: truncateDiff passes through small diffs unchanged
tests.validates: Diffs under limit are returned as-is

tests.description: filterDiff removes lock files and binary markers
tests.validates: package-lock.json, yarn.lock, binary files removed

tests.description: extractDiffStats counts files/insertions/deletions
tests.validates: Accurate parsing of unified diff format

tests.description: buildAnalysisPrompt returns system+user messages
tests.validates: System has JSON schema, user has PR metadata and diff

tests.description: buildAnalysisPrompt handles empty description
tests.validates: No crash or 'undefined' when description is null/empty

tests.description: Claude client sends request with correct headers and parses JSON response
tests.validates: Mocked fetch to api.anthropic.com, correct headers, JSON parsing into AnalysisResult

tests.description: Claude client throws ClaudeParseError on invalid JSON response
tests.validates: ClaudeParseError thrown with raw response attached

tests.description: Claude client throws ClaudeApiError on HTTP errors
tests.validates: ClaudeApiError for 401, 429, 500 status codes

tests.description: Manifest V3 is valid and Vite build produces extension structure
tests.validates: manifest.json has required fields, permissions, host_permissions

tests.description: storage.ts getApiKeys/setApiKeys read and write chrome.storage.local
tests.validates: Mocked chrome.storage.local; getApiKeys returns typed keys; setApiKeys persists

tests.description: Options page renders fields, saves keys, shows feedback
tests.validates: Two inputs render, save triggers chrome.storage.local.set, success feedback shown

tests.description: PrUrlForm auto-detects PR URL from active tab
tests.validates: Mocked chrome.tabs.query returns PR URL, input pre-filled

tests.description: PrUrlForm renders and calls onSubmit with URL
tests.validates: Input renders, submit calls handler, disabled when empty

tests.description: PrUrlForm shows validation error on blur for invalid URLs
tests.validates: Invalid URL shows error, clears on valid input

tests.description: AnalysisLoading renders spinner and status text
tests.validates: aria-busy=true, status text visible

tests.description: AnalysisResults renders all sections
tests.validates: Summary, changes with impact, risks with severity badges, suggestions all render

tests.description: AnalysisResults handles empty arrays
tests.validates: Shows 'None identified' for empty risks/suggestions

tests.description: ErrorDisplay shows message, retry button, and options link for key errors
tests.validates: Error message visible, role=alert, retry calls handler, 401 shows configure keys link

tests.description: analyzePr orchestrates full pipeline and returns AnalysisResponse
tests.validates: Mocked storage + fetch; full flow from URL to AnalysisResponse

tests.description: analyzePr throws appropriate errors for each failure mode
tests.validates: Missing API key, GitHub 404, Claude parse error all produce correct typed errors

tests.description: Popup App: idle -> loading -> success and idle -> loading -> error -> retry
tests.validates: State machine transitions, results display, error display with retry

tests.description: Content script injects button on GitHub PR pages
tests.validates: Button appears in DOM on PR page URL, not on other GitHub pages

tests.description: GitHub Actions workflow files are valid YAML with correct jobs
tests.validates: CI files parse correctly, contain lint/typecheck/test/build jobs
